_comment: ComfyUI Workflow Finder — suggested search phrases. Edit freely, add your own, reorganize categories. Reload the app to pick up changes.

Video Generation: generate video from a text prompt
extend or continue a video clip
text to video with camera movement
Video Analysis: load a video and generate a caption or description
analyze video content with a vision model
generate a prompt from a video frame
describe what is happening in a video
video to text transcription or description
Image Generation: high resolution image generation with upscale
generate image with a reference style
Image Editing: inpainting to fill or replace an area
sharpen or restore a blurry image
ControlNet: image generation with depth map control
image generation with canny edge control
Face: portrait with face reference using PuLID
portrait with face reference using InstantID
multiple face swaps in one image
Captioning and Vision LLM: tag an image with WD14 tagger
describe image contents with a vision model
generate a prompt from an existing image
describe image style for prompt reuse
LoRA and Models: use a single LoRA for style
use a detail or texture LoRA
apply a face LoRA for likeness
IP-Adapter and Reference: use a reference image for style
Segmentation and Masking: segment and mask an object with SAM
detect and isolate object with GroundingDINO
Upscaling: ultimate tile upscale for large images
Batch and Automation: batch process multiple images from a folder
batch generate with prompts from a text file
process image list with consistent settings
bulk image resizing or format conversion
iterate through LoRAs on same prompt
Audio: load audio and combine with video
text to speech for video narration
add music or sound to generated video
Qwen Image Edit: edit an image using a text instruction
change object color with Qwen image edit
rotate or repose object in image
add or remove element from image
multiple angle views of same object
